name: Pork Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl to create the marinade.
2. Place 3 lbs of pork shoulder butt roast into a large resealable plastic bag or shallow dish.
3. Pour the marinade over the meat, ensuring it is fully coated.
4. Seal the bag or cover the dish and refrigerate for at least 8 hours, preferably overnight to allow the flavors to develop.
5. When ready to cook, remove the pork from the marinade and let it come to room temperature before cooking.
